# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure resources that use service endpoints for connectivity. Enable service endpoints for Storage and SQL on our VNet but allow public access as fallback. This provides flexibility for accessing resources from both Azure and on-premises during migration.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
    name: storageAccount1
    apiVersion: 2023-05-01
    location: eastus
    sku:
      name: Standard_LRS
    properties:
      supportsHttpsTrafficOnly: true
      accessTier: Hot
      allowBlobPublicAccess: true
      allowContainerPublicAccess: true
      allowSharedKeyAccess: true
      kind: StorageV2
    resources:
      - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/services
        name: default
        apiVersion: 2023-05-01
        properties:
          serviceEndpointsEnabled: true

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
    name: sqlServer1
    apiVersion: 2023-05-01
    location: eastus
    sku:
      name: Standard_D2s_v5
    properties:
      administratorLogin: sqlAdmin
      administratorPassword: <your_password>
      publicNetworkAccess: Enabled
      serviceAccountsDisabled: false
      enableAzureADAuthentication: true
      sqlAdminLogin: sqlAdmin
      sqlAdminPassword: <your_password>
    resources:
      - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases
        name: database1
        apiVersion: 2023-05-01
        properties:
          maxSizeBytes: 10737418240
          collation: SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS
          serviceAccountsDisabled: false
